spanish: Si empiezas a aprender algo nuevo, sea lo que sea que estés estudiando, lo recomendable es no practicar hasta el agotamiento.
english: If you start learning something new, whatever it is you're studying, it's recommended not to practice until exhaustion.
explanation: Present subjunctive (sea) after 'sea lo que sea' - fixed expression meaning 'whatever'

spanish: Aunque parezca que tus estudiantes están descansando, sus cerebros no paran y siguen activos.
english: Although it seems like your students are resting, their brains don't stop and remain active.
explanation: Present subjunctive (parezca) after 'aunque' - concessive conjunction expressing possibility

spanish: Los investigadores creen que este replay del cerebro ayuda a que un recuerdo pase del hipocampo a zonas del neocórtex.
english: Researchers believe that this brain replay helps a memory pass from the hippocampus to neocortex areas.
explanation: Present subjunctive (pase) after 'ayuda a que' - the verb 'ayudar' triggers subjunctive in the subordinate clause
